register_encounter.description: register encounter a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only register encounter a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the encounter A is registered and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I register encounter a patient encounter A, it is the case that the encounter A is registered

assign_interface_to_patient.description: assign an oxygen interface point B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign an oxygen interface point B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the interface is available at B and the patient encounter A is compatible with the oxygen interface point B
I can only assign an oxygen interface point B to a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the assignment is in progress for A
effects: Once I assign an oxygen interface point B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that the interface B is assigned to the patient encounter A and the assignment is in progress for A
Once I assign an oxygen interface point B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the interface is available at B

release_interface_and_cleanup.description: release an oxygen interface point B from a patient encounter A and perform cleanup
preconditions: I can only release an oxygen interface point B from a patient encounter A and perform cleanup if it is the case that the interface B is assigned to the patient encounter A

I can only release an oxygen interface point B from a patient encounter A and perform cleanup if it is not the case that the order is confirmed for A and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I release an oxygen interface point B from a patient encounter A and perform cleanup, it is the case that the interface is available at B

Once I release an oxygen interface point B from a patient encounter A and perform cleanup, it is not the case anymore that the interface B is assigned to the patient encounter A and it is not the case anymore that the assignment is in progress for A and it is not the case anymore that the adapter is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that the therapy setup is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a consumable staged and it is not the case anymore that A has an active therapy and it is not the case anymore that the ancillary required flag is set for the patient encounter A

reserve_adapter_for_patient.description: reserve an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only reserve an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the adapter kit B is available
effects: Once I reserve an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A
Once I reserve an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the adapter kit B is available

release_adapter_from_patient.description: release an adapter kit B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release an adapter kit B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A
effects: Once I release an adapter kit B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the adapter kit B is available
Once I release an adapter kit B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A

attach_adapter.description: attach an adapter kit B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only attach an adapter kit B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the assignment is in progress for A and the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A
I can only attach an adapter kit B to a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the adapter is attached to A
effects: Once I attach an adapter kit B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that the adapter is attached to A

apply_consumable.description: apply a consumable stock item B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only apply a consumable stock item B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the assignment is in progress for A and the consumable stock item B is available
I can only apply a consumable stock item B to a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the adapter is attached to A
effects: Once I apply a consumable stock item B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that the adapter is attached to A and A has a consumable staged
Once I apply a consumable stock item B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the consumable stock item B is available

therapist_confirm_setup_with_adapter.description: therapist a respiratory therapist C confirms setup with an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only therapist a respiratory therapist C confirms setup with an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the adapter is attached to A and the assignment is in progress for A and the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A and the respiratory therapist C is available
I can only therapist a respiratory therapist C confirms setup with an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the therapy setup is complete for A
effects: Once I therapist a respiratory therapist C confirms setup with an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the therapy setup is complete for A
Once I therapist a respiratory therapist C confirms setup with an adapter kit B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that A has a consumable staged

therapist_confirm_setup_with_resource_ba.description: therapist confirms setup with a resource batch B for a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only therapist confirms setup with a resource batch B for a patient encounter A if it is the case that the assignment is in progress for A and B is allocated to A
I can only therapist confirms setup with a resource batch B for a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the therapy setup is complete for A
effects: Once I therapist confirms setup with a resource batch B for a patient encounter A, it is the case that the therapy setup is complete for A
Once I therapist confirms setup with a resource batch B for a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that A has a consumable staged

assign_oxygen_source_to_patient.description: assign an oxygen source unit B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign an oxygen source unit B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the source B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the oxygen source unit B
effects: Once I assign an oxygen source unit B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that B is assigned as the source for A
Once I assign an oxygen source unit B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the source B is available

release_oxygen_source.description: release an oxygen source unit B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release an oxygen source unit B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that B is assigned as the source for A
effects: Once I release an oxygen source unit B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the source B is available
Once I release an oxygen source unit B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the source for A

assign_interface_device_to_patient.description: assign a patient interface device B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a patient interface device B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the device B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the patient interface device B
effects: Once I assign a patient interface device B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I assign a patient interface device B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the device B is available

release_interface_device.description: release a patient interface device B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a patient interface device B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a patient interface device B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the device B is available
Once I release a patient interface device B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

assign_high_flow_device_to_patient.description: assign a high flow device unit B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a high flow device unit B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the high flow device unit B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the high flow device unit B
effects: Once I assign a high flow device unit B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I assign a high flow device unit B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the high flow device unit B is available

release_high_flow_device.description: release a high flow device unit B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a high flow device unit B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a high flow device unit B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the high flow device unit B is available
Once I release a high flow device unit B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

assign_monitor_to_patient.description: assign a monitoring device unit B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only assign a monitoring device unit B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the monitoring device unit B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the monitoring device unit B
effects: Once I assign a monitoring device unit B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that B is assigned to monitor A
Once I assign a monitoring device unit B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the monitoring device unit B is available

release_monitor_from_patient.description: release a monitoring device unit B from a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only release a monitoring device unit B from a patient encounter A if it is the case that B is assigned to monitor A
effects: Once I release a monitoring device unit B from a patient encounter A, it is the case that the monitoring device unit B is available
Once I release a monitoring device unit B from a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to monitor A

create_therapy_order_with_source_and_dev.description: create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, an oxygen source unit C, and a patient interface device D
preconditions: I can only create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, an oxygen source unit C, and a patient interface device D if it is the case that the assignment is in progress for A and C is assigned as the source for A and D is assigned to A and the protocol B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the therapy protocol B
I can only create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, an oxygen source unit C, and a patient interface device D if it is not the case that the order is confirmed for A
effects: Once I create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, an oxygen source unit C, and a patient interface device D, it is the case that B is ordered for A and the order is confirmed for A

Once I create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, an oxygen source unit C, and a patient interface device D, it is not the case anymore that the protocol B is available

create_therapy_order_with_highflow_and_a.description: create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, a high flow device unit C, and an ancillary module D
preconditions: I can only create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, a high flow device unit C, and an ancillary module D if it is the case that the assignment is in progress for A and C is assigned to A and the ancillary module D is available and the protocol B is available and the patient encounter A is compatible with the therapy protocol B and the patient encounter A is compatible with the ancillary module D
I can only create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, a high flow device unit C, and an ancillary module D if it is not the case that the order is confirmed for A
effects: Once I create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, a high flow device unit C, and an ancillary module D, it is the case that B is ordered for A and the order is confirmed for A and the ancillary required flag is set for the patient encounter A and A has a consumable staged

Once I create therapy order for a patient encounter A using a therapy protocol B, a high flow device unit C, and an ancillary module D, it is not the case anymore that the protocol B is available and it is not the case anymore that the ancillary module D is available

finalize_order_staging.description: finalize order staging for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C
preconditions: I can only finalize order staging for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C if it is the case that the order is confirmed for A and the ancillary required flag is set for the patient encounter A and B is assigned as the source for A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I finalize order staging for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C, it is not the case anymore that the ancillary required flag is set for the patient encounter A and it is not the case anymore that A has a consumable staged

assign_team_and_grant_approval.description: assign a nursing team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C
preconditions: I can only assign a nursing team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C if it is the case that the therapy setup is complete for A and the order is confirmed for A and B is assigned as the source for A and C is assigned to A and the patient encounter A is eligible for the clinical team D

I can only assign a nursing team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C if it is not the case that A has a consumable staged and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I assign a nursing team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C, it is the case that approval is granted for A

assign_resp_team_and_grant_approval.description: assign a respiratory team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with a high flow device unit B and a monitoring device unit C
preconditions: I can only assign a respiratory team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with a high flow device unit B and a monitoring device unit C if it is the case that the therapy setup is complete for A and the order is confirmed for A and B is assigned to A and C is assigned to monitor A and the patient encounter A is eligible for the clinical team D
I can only assign a respiratory team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with a high flow device unit B and a monitoring device unit C if it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I assign a respiratory team D and grant approval for a patient encounter A with a high flow device unit B and a monitoring device unit C, it is the case that approval is granted for A and A has a consumable staged

activate_therapy.description: activate therapy for a patient encounter A using an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C
preconditions: I can only activate therapy for a patient encounter A using an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C if it is the case that approval is granted for A and A has a consumable staged and B is assigned as the source for A and C is assigned to A
effects: Once I activate therapy for a patient encounter A using an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C, it is the case that A has an active therapy

Once I activate therapy for a patient encounter A using an oxygen source unit B and a patient interface device C, it is not the case anymore that A has a consumable staged and it is not the case anymore that the therapy setup is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that the ancillary required flag is set for the patient encounter A

therapist_attach_adapter_for_finalizatio.description: therapist a respiratory therapist C attaches an adapter kit B for finalization of a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only therapist a respiratory therapist C attaches an adapter kit B for finalization of a patient encounter A if it is the case that A has an active therapy and approval is granted for A and the assignment is in progress for A and the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A and the respiratory therapist C is available
I can only therapist a respiratory therapist C attaches an adapter kit B for finalization of a patient encounter A if it is not the case that the therapy setup is complete for A
effects: Once I therapist a respiratory therapist C attaches an adapter kit B for finalization of a patient encounter A, it is the case that the therapy setup is complete for A

complete_adapter_qc_check.description: complete quality control check for an adapter kit B in a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only complete quality control check for an adapter kit B in a patient encounter A if it is the case that approval is granted for A and the therapy setup is complete for A and the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A

I can only complete quality control check for an adapter kit B in a patient encounter A if it is not the case that A has a consumable staged and it is not the case that safety check is completed for A
effects: Once I complete quality control check for an adapter kit B in a patient encounter A, it is the case that safety check is completed for A

complete_consumable_qc_check.description: complete quality control check for a consumable stock item B in a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only complete quality control check for a consumable stock item B in a patient encounter A if it is the case that approval is granted for A and the therapy setup is complete for A and the consumable stock item B is available

I can only complete quality control check for a consumable stock item B in a patient encounter A if it is not the case that A has a consumable staged and it is not the case that safety check is completed for A
effects: Once I complete quality control check for a consumable stock item B in a patient encounter A, it is the case that safety check is completed for A
Once I complete quality control check for a consumable stock item B in a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the consumable stock item B is available

bind_resource_batch_to_patient.description: bind a resource batch B to a patient encounter A
preconditions: I can only bind a resource batch B to a patient encounter A if it is the case that safety check is completed for A and the resource batch B is available and patient resource binding is possible for A with B
effects: Once I bind a resource batch B to a patient encounter A, it is the case that the patient encounter A is compatible with the resource batch B
Once I bind a resource batch B to a patient encounter A, it is not the case anymore that the resource batch B is available

linked_adult_patient.description: link a patient pediatric A with a patient adult B using a resource batch C
preconditions: I can only link a patient pediatric A with a patient adult B using a resource batch C if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the special population flag is set for the patient encounter A and A is linked to the cohort resource C and the patient encounter B is compatible with the resource batch C
I can only link a patient pediatric A with a patient adult B using a resource batch C if it is not the case that C is allocated to A
effects: Once I link a patient pediatric A with a patient adult B using a resource batch C, it is the case that C is allocated to A

activate_monitoring_workflow.description: activate monitoring workflow for a patient encounter A using an adapter kit B with the assistance of a respiratory therapist C
preconditions: I can only activate monitoring workflow for a patient encounter A using an adapter kit B with the assistance of a respiratory therapist C if it is the case that the encounter A is registered and the special population flag is set for the patient encounter A and the therapy setup is complete for A and safety check is completed for A and the adapter kit B is assigned to the patient encounter A and the respiratory therapist C is available
I can only activate monitoring workflow for a patient encounter A using an adapter kit B with the assistance of a respiratory therapist C if it is not the case that monitoring is activated for A
effects: Once I activate monitoring workflow for a patient encounter A using an adapter kit B with the assistance of a respiratory therapist C, it is the case that monitoring is activated for A

finalize_encounter_standard.description: finalize encounter for a patient encounter A using the standard procedure
preconditions: I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A using the standard procedure if it is the case that the stabilized flag is set for the patient encounter A and the encounter A is registered and the assignment is in progress for A and the order is confirmed for A and approval is granted for A and safety check is completed for A and the therapy setup is complete for A
I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A using the standard procedure if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize encounter for a patient encounter A using the standard procedure, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_encounter_with_resource_batch.description: finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with a resource batch B using the resource batch method
preconditions: I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with a resource batch B using the resource batch method if it is the case that the special population flag is set for the patient encounter A and the encounter A is registered and the assignment is in progress for A and the order is confirmed for A and approval is granted for A and safety check is completed for A and the therapy setup is complete for A and B is allocated to A
I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with a resource batch B using the resource batch method if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with a resource batch B using the resource batch method, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_encounter_with_monitoring.description: finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with monitoring activated
preconditions: I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with monitoring activated if it is the case that the special population flag is set for the patient encounter A and the encounter A is registered and the assignment is in progress for A and the order is confirmed for A and approval is granted for A and safety check is completed for A and the therapy setup is complete for A and monitoring is activated for A
I can only finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with monitoring activated if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize encounter for a patient encounter A with monitoring activated, it is the case that A is finalized

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a patient encounter or a oxygen interface point or a therapy protocol or a patient interface device or a oxygen source unit or a high flow device unit or a adapter kit or a consumable stock item or a resource batch or a respiratory therapist or a ancillary module or a monitoring device unit or a clinical team is also a object
Everything that is a nursing team or a respiratory team is also a clinical team
Everything that is a patient adult or a patient pediatric is also a patient encounter
